releaseNotes:
• Fix (TV): A/V sync restored on low-RAM TV boxes. The previous hardware decoder path caused video to lag behind audio; software decode keeps them in sync and avoids the black-screen failure it was replacing.
• Fix (TV): D-pad can now leave the multi-view channel picker search bar and reach the channel list. The setup wizard text fields also yield focus so the wizard is completable with a remote.
• Improvement (TV): focused rows and buttons now show a visible highlight throughout the app so you can always see where the remote is.
